description: Features: 1. FenFang foldable shopping bags made of high quality Oxford Fabric with good stitching,durable, reusable, and eco-friendly. 2. Lightweight: only 50g. 3. The shopper bag can be folded to a small size of 14x11cm, not taking up much space and easy to carry. 4. Easy to clean: simply wipe it or machine wash at low temperature. 5. Big size with extra large capacity and load up to 22kg. 6. Widened handle to effectively reduce shoulder burden or hand burden, comfortable to use. 7. Equipped with a little inner pouch for keys or other small items, quite practical. 8. Various stylish patterns for choice. 9. Perfect for daily use, shopping, storage, travel, sports, picnic or camping. Specification: Material : Oxford Fabric Color : As shown in pictures Size: 56cm(22 inch) * 41cm(16 inch), handle 26cm(10 inch) Weight: 50 g Package included: 1 x reusable shopping bags foldable
